Description: Iceland Northern Lights — my favorite place since I was a kid and saw it in many movies.
Edinburgh Castle — I chose this place because it has the mood of dark fantasy.
Salar de Uyuni — famous for its mirror-like reflection photos in the rainy season.
Louvre Museum — a famous museum in France that has many famous art objects.
Kyoto — famous for cherry blossoms and beautiful shrines.
Floating Torii Saga Shrine — a beautiful place for relaxing and sightseeing.
Cappadocia Balloon Festival — beautiful hot air balloons in Turkey.
Sea of Stars — the perfect beach with glowing blue bioluminescent waves.
Great Wall of China — a place I always wanted to walk through.
Tunnel of Love — a beautiful nature-filled train path.
